title: Note taker personalization

posts.author: Otto-Sento (Otrto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The AI notetaker on corporate sessions looks better if we could personlize the picture, logo of the company. I love the llama, but it’s not that good when talking with enterprises.

What are you trying to achieve

My logo, and company name on my AI notetaker.

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Otto-Sento, Tom from monday.com here. We just released this capability yesterday You can change the appearance of the Notetaker icon in your meetings. To change the image, head to Notetaker Settings > Organizational Preferences > Admin. From there, you can select the preferred icon.
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/28017248522130-monday-com-AI-Notetaker#h_01K3W8ND8YCN784W50J680GWPR
